title: Zazie Beetz's Thriller 'They Will Kill You' Is a Box Office Flop, But an HBO Max Hit

captions.instagram: Zazie Beetz's new movie "They Will Kill You" flopped at the box office, but it's found new life on HBO Max! 🎬 It went from a $10.9M domestic gross to a top 3 film on streaming. Get the full story on why this action-horror flick is finally getting its due. #ZazieBeetz #TheyWillKillYou #HBOMax #BoxOffice #StreamingSuccess #MovieNews
captions.facebook: Zazie Beetz's "They Will Kill You" struggled in theaters, but it's now a huge hit on HBO Max! This action-horror film is proving that some movies are just meant for streaming. Have you seen it yet?

pinterest.title: Zazie Beetz's 'They Will Kill You' Flops at Box Office, Becomes HBO Max Hit
pinterest.description: Discover how Zazie Beetz's action-horror film 'They Will Kill You' went from a box office disappointment to a top 3 movie on HBO Max. Learn about its unique plot, star performance, and why it's resonating with streaming audiences. Perfect for fans of thrillers and dark comedy.

youtube.title: Zazie Beetz's 'They Will Kill You' Bombs at Box Office, Dominates HBO Max #Shorts
youtube.description: Zazie Beetz's new film 'They Will Kill You' had a rough theatrical run but is now a top performer on HBO Max. Find out why this action-horror flick is a must-see for streaming audiences.
